reference_answer: Pharmacy supervisor Tomas Reed held custody of the vaccine fridge key.
DR-4 proposed allowing all shift nurses to sign out the fridge key during flu-clinic hours.
DR-4 remained draft pending medical director approval.
MO-4 allowed supervised checkout at the pharmacy desk during flu-clinic hours but did not authorize all shift nurses to hold the key.
BN-4 was noncontrolling because it copied DR-4 and omitted MO-4 and CF-4.
